# CVE Fix Guidance — red-hat-data-services/eval-hub
<!-- last-analyzed: 2026-04-01 | cve-merged: 44 | cve-closed: 4 -->

## Titles

**Renovate Docker digest updates:**
`chore(deps): update registry.access.redhat.com/ubi9/<image> docker digest to <hash> (<target-branch>)` (44/44 merged)

Examples:
- `chore(deps): update registry.access.redhat.com/ubi9/go-toolset docker digest to 0f4f6f7 (main)`
- `chore(deps): update registry.access.redhat.com/ubi9/ubi-minimal docker digest to 83006d5 (rhoai-3.4-ea.2)`

## Branches

**Renovate Docker digest updates:**
`renovate/docker-main/<target-branch>/dockerfile-digest-updates` (44/44 merged)

Examples:
- `renovate/docker-main/main/dockerfile-digest-updates`
- `renovate/docker-main/rhoai-3.4-ea.1/dockerfile-digest-updates`
- `renovate/docker-main/rhoai-3.4-ea.2/dockerfile-digest-updates`

## Files

Update `Dockerfile.konflux` only (44/44 merged + 4 closed)

## Labels

No labels are applied to dependency PRs in this repository (44/44 merged)

## Notes

Closed PRs have " - autoclosed" appended to title, indicating they were superseded by newer digest updates (4/4 closed)
